facebook.caption: POV: you walked Đường Trần Hưng Đạo three times before finally stepping inside Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant. Big mistake waiting that long. 4.7 stars across 702 reviews. On one of Phu Quoc's busiest streets, yet somehow flies under most tourist radars. Real Vietnamese food, no resort markup. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked straight past it twice. Third time, curiosity won. Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.7 stars, 702 reviews, and a menu that needs zero translation help to order well. Go.

instagram.caption: Walked past it twice. Don't be me. Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant. 4.7★, 702 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 702 reviews on a Phu Quoc street spot. Inside Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant. Worth every step back.

tiktok.caption: POV: almost skipped Nhà hàng Thì Là Restaurant. 4.7★ and 702 reviews said otherwise. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
